definition:
A man living at the time of Exile and Return, first mentioned at Dan.5.1; 
 son of: Nebuchadnezzar (H5019)
Aramaic of be.le.shats.tsar (בֵּֽלְאשַׁצַּר, בֵּלְשַׁאצַּר "Belshazzar" H1112) 
 § Belshazzar = "Bel protect the king"
 king of Babylon at the time of its fall; he to whom Daniel interpreted the writing on the wall
